raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1383 requires 12 weeks of protective leave for employers in California.",
    "Employers with as few as five employees must comply with SB 1383 or face litigation.",
    "Senator Brian Jones claims that SB 1383 will severely impact thousands of small businesses in California.",
